name: openflipbook
description: Open-source clone of flipbook.page — image-is-the-UI, BYO-keys demo.
author: Eren Akbulut <erenakbulutwork@gmail.com>

scripts.modal:serve: cd apps/modal-backend && modal serve generate.py ltx_stream.py
scripts.modal:deploy: cd apps/modal-backend && modal deploy generate.py ltx_stream.py
scripts.record-demo: cd scripts/record-demo && pnpm install --ignore-workspace --silent && pnpm start
